description: First audio file (audio/<sha256>.<ext>) has one byte at the midpoint XOR'd with 0x01. SHA-256 of file changes; manifest's declared SHA-256 stays the same.

modifications.mutation: Byte at index floor(length/2) XOR'd with 0x01.
modifications.rationale: Mid-file mutation avoids leading-bytes parsers; SHA-256 still changes deterministically. Check 2 iterates manifest.artifacts and detects the per-file SHA mismatch.

expected_failures: check 2 (artifact integrity): audio/<sha256>.<ext> SHA-256 declared in manifest no longer matches computed SHA-256 of mutated bytes.
